hook: 32 outlets covered Hantavirus outbreak on MV Hondius. `italy` used totally different words.

tweets.text: 32 buckets, 55 articles, 8 distinct frames in today's coverage.

Frame: NATIONALS_TRACKING_AND_REPATRIATION (8 buckets). "Australian authorities are preparing to repatriate four citizens and one permanent resident from a hantavirus-afflicted cruise ship headed…" — 9News

Frame: WHO_COORDINATION_AS_REASSURANCE (4 buckets). "The World Health Organization's chief is due in the Spanish island of Tenerife on Saturday (May 9, 2026) to help coordinate the evacuation…" — The Hindu Intl
Frame: COVID_COMPARISON_REJECTED (4 buckets). "WHO chief says hantavirus outbreak not like start of Covid pandemic" — Daily Sabah
Frame: TENERIFE_POLITICAL_FLASHPOINT (3 buckets). "Fernando Clavijo: “No estaré tranquilo hasta que no despeguen los aviones rumbo a sus países”" — El Pais

Silence as data: `china` didn't cover this — they covered China, which has the world's largest outbound cruise market and significant interest in Andes hantavirus given its own distinct hantavirus strains, produced no coverage captured today. instead.

**Daily Maverick** (south_africa): Ran the Ramaphosa Constitutional Court impeachment story entirely in place of hantavirus coverage — the only bucket whose dominant signal was a completely different story.
